languages.text: [Signal to Isimond] "A cautious approach will surely be welcomed by the enforcers as well."
languages.original_text: [Подать знак Изимонду] "Осторожность, несомненно, придется по душе и блюстителям".

languages.text: 【向伊西蒙德示意】“谨慎的方案一定会得到执法者的欢迎。”
languages.original_text: [Signal to Isimond] "A cautious approach will surely be welcomed by the enforcers as well."

traits.locale_text: 【向伊西蒙德示意】“谨慎的方案一定会得到执法者的欢迎。”

languages.text: [Faire un geste vers Isimond] « Une approche prudente ferait sans doute grand plaisir aux prévôts. »
languages.original_text: [Signal to Isimond] "A cautious approach will surely be welcomed by the enforcers as well."

traits.locale_text: [Faire un geste vers Isimond] « Une approche prudente ferait sans doute grand plaisir aux prévôts. »

languages.text: [Dar la señal a Isimond] «Un enfoque cauto sin duda agradará al personal de seguridad».
languages.original_text: [Signal to Isimond] "A cautious approach will surely be welcomed by the enforcers as well."

traits.locale_text: [Dar la señal a Isimond] «Un enfoque cauto sin duda agradará al personal de seguridad».

languages.text: [İsimond'u işaret et] "İhtiyatlı bir yaklaşım, infazcılar tarafından da kesinlikle memnuniyetle karşılanacaktır."
languages.original_text: [Signal to Isimond] "A cautious approach will surely be welcomed by the enforcers as well."

traits.locale_text: [İsimond'u işaret et] "İhtiyatlı bir yaklaşım, infazcılar tarafından da kesinlikle memnuniyetle karşılanacaktır."

languages.text: [Isimond ein Zeichen geben] "Ein vorsichtiges Vorgehen werden sicher auch die Enforcer begrüßen."
languages.original_text: [Signal to Isimond] "A cautious approach will surely be welcomed by the enforcers as well."

traits.locale_text: [Isimond ein Zeichen geben] "Ein vorsichtiges Vorgehen werden sicher auch die Enforcer begrüßen."

languages.text: [イシモンドに伝える] 「慎重な対応は、執行者たちにとっても歓迎されるでしょう」
languages.original_text: [Signal to Isimond] "A cautious approach will surely be welcomed by the enforcers as well."

traits.locale_text: [イシモンドに伝える] 「慎重な対応は、執行者たちにとっても歓迎されるでしょう」
